serverInfo.name: bdc-cockpit-mcp-server
serverInfo.description: MCP server for BDC Cockpit — register, publish, and manage the lifecycle of Data Products in SAP Business Data Cloud

tools.name: listBdcDataProducts
tools.title: List BDC Data Products
tools.description: List all Data Products registered in BDC Cockpit, including SAP-managed and custom products. Use to check what already exists before creating new ones.

tools.name: registerDataProduct
tools.title: Register Data Product
tools.description: Register a new custom Data Product in BDC Cockpit. Supports HDL-backed (DPE SDK), Datasphere-backed, and external Data Products. Returns a DRAFT product ready for publishing.

tools.name: getBdcDataProduct
tools.title: Get BDC Data Product
tools.description: Get full details of a specific BDC Data Product by ID.

tools.name: updateDataProduct
tools.title: Update Data Product
tools.description: Update metadata (description, owner, tags) of a BDC Data Product.

tools.name: publishDataProduct
tools.title: Publish Data Product
tools.description: Publish a DRAFT Data Product to the BDC catalog, making it discoverable and consumable by analytics and data consumers.

tools.name: getDataProductStatus
tools.title: Get Data Product Status
tools.description: Check the current lifecycle status of a BDC Data Product: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, DEPRECATED, or ERROR.
